changes.summary: User-content retention reduced from 90 to 30 days
changes.before: User content is retained for ninety (90) days after account deletion.
changes.after: User content is retained for thirty (30) days after account deletion.

citations.quote: User content is retained for thirty (30) days after account deletion.

changes.summary: Team plan per-seat rises from $16 to $19 (+18.75%)
changes.before: $16 per user / month
changes.after: $19 per user / month

citations.quote: Team plan: $19 per user / month, billed annually.

recommendation.copy: Open renewal conversation; cite Section 7.2 retention shortfall as material change.

changes.summary: New sub-processor added: TextRecognize Ltd (India)
changes.before: Sub-processors list does not include TextRecognize Ltd.
changes.after: Sub-processors list now includes TextRecognize Ltd, processing OCR text for KYC document validation.

citations.quote: TextRecognize Ltd - India - OCR text extraction for identity document validation.

recommendation.copy: Notify Privacy and DPO; assess transfer mechanism for non-adequate jurisdiction.

changes.summary: Sub-processor added: Datadog India Pvt. Ltd (non-adequate jurisdiction)
changes.before: Sub-processors are located in: United States, Germany, Ireland.
changes.after: Sub-processors are located in: United States, Germany, Ireland, India (Datadog India Pvt. Ltd.).

recommendation.copy: Notify customers under 30-day DPA clause; assess transfer mechanism for India.

headline: Renewal in 47 days, 412 unused of 850 seats

changes.summary: 412 of 850 seats unused; benchmark shows 12% above market rate
changes.before: Current contract: 850 seats at $815,000/yr, renews 2026-07-10.
changes.after: Renewal window open. 412 seats idle >90 days. Benchmark: 12% above market rate.

recommendation.copy: Right-size to 500 seats and negotiate 22% reduction citing utilization data.

changes.summary: Stripe pricing page added a per-PaymentIntent fee
changes.before: 2.9% + 30c per successful card charge.
changes.after: 2.9% + 30c per successful card charge. Additionally, $0.30 per PaymentIntent created regardless of outcome.

recommendation.copy: Engage AE to negotiate waiver of per-intent fee given $250k+ volume tier.

changes.summary: 18 seats with zero sessions in 60 days; $1.8k recoverable
changes.before: 68 active Figma Enterprise seats across design and product teams.
changes.after: 50 active / 18 seats with no login activity in 60+ days.

recommendation.copy: Right-size at next billing cycle; surface to design lead.

headline: DPA updated: AI training clause added

changes.summary: Slack DPA now permits using customer message data to train Slack AI by default
changes.before: Slack will not use Customer Data to train machine learning models.
changes.after: Slack may use aggregated, de-identified Customer Data to improve Slack AI features. Customers may opt out via Admin settings.

citations.quote: Slack may use aggregated, de-identified Customer Data to improve Slack AI features

recommendation.copy: Toggle opt-out in admin settings; notify Privacy team and document in DPA register.

changes.summary: GitHub auto-enrolled 41 seats in Copilot Enterprise via policy change
changes.before: GitHub Copilot Business: 87 seats (engineering org only).
changes.after: GitHub Copilot Enterprise: 128 seats (auto-enrolled all org members via policy change).

recommendation.copy: Roll back auto-add; downgrade to Business tier; request credit for overage.

headline: EC2 On-Demand price up 11.2% in us-east-1

changes.summary: m6i family On-Demand prices increased 11.2% effective June 1, 2026
changes.before: m6i.xlarge On-Demand: $0.192/hr in us-east-1.
changes.after: m6i.xlarge On-Demand: $0.2136/hr in us-east-1 (effective June 1, 2026).

citations.quote: $0.2136 per On-Demand Linux m6i.xlarge Instance Hour

recommendation.copy: Negotiate EDP and increase RI coverage to 70% before June 1 increase lands.

changes.summary: Vercel added Hetzner GmbH (Germany) as a sub-processor
changes.before: Infrastructure sub-processors: AWS (US), Google Cloud (US/EU).
changes.after: Infrastructure sub-processors: AWS (US), Google Cloud (US/EU), Hetzner GmbH (Germany, EU).

recommendation.copy: EU-adequate; no customer notification required. Log in sub-processor registry.

headline: SOC 2 Type II expires in 60 days

changes.summary: Okta SOC 2 cert expires 2026-07-23; renewal audit in progress
changes.before: Okta SOC 2 Type II (Period: 2025-07-24 to 2026-07-23) - Valid.
changes.after: Okta SOC 2 Type II - Expires in 60 days (2026-07-23). Renewal audit in progress.

citations.quote: SOC 2 Type II report valid through July 23, 2026

recommendation.copy: Confirm renewal timeline with Okta TAM; flag for auditor compliance review.

headline: Renewal in 89 days, negotiate before Q3 freeze

changes.summary: Marketing Hub Professional renewal window opens; HubSpot Q3 price hike pattern
changes.before: HubSpot Marketing Hub Professional: $116,000/yr, renews 2026-10-22.
changes.after: Renewal window open. HubSpot historically increases prices in Q3; negotiate now.

recommendation.copy: Lock pre-freeze rate; offer 2-year commit for stability.

headline: 24 Adobe CC seats redundant with Figma

changes.summary: 24 Adobe seats overlap with Figma assignments; $8.4k recoverable
changes.before: Adobe Creative Cloud All Apps: 24 seats in design team.
changes.after: 24 seats unused >90 days; team fully migrated to Figma. Duplicate tool overlap detected.

recommendation.copy: Drop overlap seats at next renewal; consolidate on Figma.

changes.summary: Workers monthly uptime SLA dropped 0.09 percentage points
changes.before: Workers monthly uptime SLA: 99.99%.
changes.after: Workers monthly uptime SLA: 99.9%.

recommendation.copy: Document; monitor real-world uptime over next 90 days before escalating.

changes.summary: On-demand storage price per credit increased 8%
changes.before: On-demand storage: $40/TB/month
changes.after: On-demand storage: $43.20/TB/month (effective Jul 1, 2026)

recommendation.copy: Lock pre-increase rate via 3-year capacity commit; reduce cold storage footprint.

changes.summary: New MAU-based pricing band introduced above 7,500 MAU
changes.before: B2C tier flat at $228/mo up to 10,000 MAU.
changes.after: B2C tier: $228/mo up to 7,500 MAU; $0.04/MAU above 7,500.

recommendation.copy: Current usage below threshold; monitor monthly MAU and revisit if breaches band.

changes.summary: Linear DPA revision adds clarification on sub-processor change notice
changes.after: Linear DPA v2.4 (2026-05-08) - sub-processor change notice clarified to 30 days.

recommendation.copy: Replace stored DPA version; no other action needed.

changes.summary: Zoom retained China-based engineering team as sub-processor for R&D
changes.before: R&D sub-processors: United States, India.
changes.after: R&D sub-processors: United States, India, China (Zoom China Engineering).

recommendation.copy: Confirmed customer data routed only via US; negotiated regional contract terms.

changes.summary: Zendesk added Bluestar BPO Vietnam for tier-2 support
changes.before: Support sub-processors: US, Ireland, Philippines.
changes.after: Support sub-processors: US, Ireland, Philippines, Vietnam (Bluestar BPO).

recommendation.copy: Schedule customer notice draft; verify SCCs in current Zendesk DPA.

changes.summary: Dispute resolution venue moved from Delaware to Dublin, Ireland
changes.before: All disputes resolved through arbitration in Wilmington, Delaware.
changes.after: All disputes resolved through arbitration in Dublin, Ireland under Irish law.

recommendation.copy: Legal review required; assess venue cost and procedural impact.

headline: SLA credit cap reduced to 25% MRC

changes.summary: Maximum monthly SLA credit cap reduced from 50% to 25% of MRC
changes.before: Maximum monthly credit: 50% of monthly recurring charges.
changes.after: Maximum monthly credit: 25% of monthly recurring charges.

recommendation.copy: Document new cap in vendor risk register; monitor over next cycle.

headline: Customer event data may train Mixpanel AI

changes.summary: Mixpanel terms now permit using aggregated event data to train internal AI models
changes.before: Customer event data used only to provide analytics services.
changes.after: Mixpanel may use aggregated event data to train internal AI models. Opt-out available via Account Settings.

recommendation.copy: Toggle opt-out; review PII fields in event payload before opt-in default applies.

changes.summary: Default encryption-at-rest upgraded from AES-128 to AES-256-GCM
changes.before: Files at rest encrypted with AES-128.
changes.after: Files at rest encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Existing files migrated by 2026-06-01.

recommendation.copy: Acknowledge improvement; reference in security register.

changes.summary: Sentry added Datadog (US) for observability — EU-adequate by SCCs
changes.before: Observability sub-processors: New Relic.
changes.after: Observability sub-processors: New Relic, Datadog.

recommendation.copy: Log in sub-processor register; no customer notification required.

changes.summary: Median notification delivery target relaxed from 5s to 8s
changes.before: Median notification delivery target: 5 seconds.
changes.after: Median notification delivery target: 8 seconds.

recommendation.copy: Document for IT; not material for current paging volume.

changes.summary: Master agreement auto-renewal default flipped to ON for new subscriptions
changes.before: Subscriptions do not auto-renew unless customer opts in.
changes.after: Subscriptions auto-renew unless customer opts out in writing 30 days prior.

recommendation.copy: Existing contract unaffected; flag for renewal cycle review.

changes.summary: Premium per-user price moves from $14.50 to $16.25/mo
changes.before: Premium per-user: $14.50/mo (51-100 users).
changes.after: Premium per-user: $16.25/mo (51-100 users).

recommendation.copy: Lock current rate via 2-year commit; downgrade non-PMs to Standard.

headline: EU data residency removed from Business tier

changes.summary: Business tier no longer guarantees EU data residency; moved to Enterprise tier
changes.before: EU data residency available on Business and Enterprise tiers.
changes.after: EU data residency available on Enterprise tier only.

citations.quote: EU residency available on Enterprise plan only

recommendation.copy: EU customers affected; assess upgrade cost vs. alternate vendor.

changes.summary: DPA revision adds FedRAMP-aligned controls language
changes.before: 1Password DPA v3.0.
changes.after: 1Password DPA v3.1 (adds FedRAMP-aligned controls).

recommendation.copy: Replace stored DPA version; no further action.

changes.summary: Workspace plan moves from $26.99 to $29/mo per host
changes.before: Workspace plan: $26.99/mo per host.
changes.after: Workspace plan: $29/mo per host (effective Jul 1, 2026).

recommendation.copy: Lock current price via 2-year commit ahead of Jul 1 increase.

changes.summary: SAML SSO restricted to Teams tier; legacy SSO users grandfathered for 90 days
changes.before: SAML SSO available on Pro and above.
changes.after: SAML SSO available on Teams and above; existing Pro SSO customers grandfathered until 2026-07-18.

recommendation.copy: Upgrade to Teams or migrate SSO-locked users; assess cost delta.

changes.summary: PostHog launched EU cloud region; opt-in via dashboard
changes.before: PostHog Cloud hosted in US only.
changes.after: PostHog Cloud available in US and EU regions; data residency selectable per project.

recommendation.copy: Migrate EU customer projects to EU region; document residency policy.

headline: Uptime SLA cap on planned maintenance

changes.summary: Planned maintenance hours now excluded from uptime SLA calculation
changes.before: All downtime counted toward 99.9% monthly uptime target.
changes.after: Planned maintenance (up to 4 hours/month) excluded from uptime calculation.

recommendation.copy: Track maintenance windows; flag any breach pattern.

headline: DPA revised, adds AI transcription clause

changes.summary: DPA revision introduces transcription processing language
changes.before: Loom DPA v1.4.
changes.after: Loom DPA v1.5 - adds AI transcription processing language with opt-out.

recommendation.copy: Configure transcription opt-out at workspace level; document.
